arts.ttl: Tottenham 3-0 Qarabag: Player ratings as 10-man Spurs prevail on night of Europa League mayhem
arts.sum: A loose touch from Radu Dragusin saw Juninho pinch the ball and race through to goal, only for the Romanian defender to trip him as the last man, and he was sent off for the foul. Dominic Solanke stole the ball off of Julio Ramao, and he played in Brennan Johnson to fire past goalkeeper Mateusz Kochalski.

Ange was asked the following questions on the fitness of Heung-Min Son, Archie Gray and Brennan Johnson... Ange was asked, 'how brave were your players to keep attacking and is that down to the principles you established last season, like in the Chelsea game?'

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min shows true Tottenham colours as Guglielmo Vicario predicts future in Europa League
arts.sum: He was then seen putting his hand out for Dragusin to shake, but seven minutes into the match, the Spurs boss will have been apoplectic that the Romanian got himself in that position by mis-controlling the ball in the middle of the pitch. And despite Qarabag having a number of good chances - one from the penalty spot - Spurs were clinical with theirs, scoring a second and third in the second half through Pape Matar Sarr and Dominic Solanke .

arts.ttl: Spurs player ratings vs Qarabag - Johnson and Solanke score but Van de Ven vital
arts.sum: Spurs reacted quickly with 10 men though and scored five minutes later with Dominic Solanke using his strength to win the ball back, hold off his marker and put Brennan Johnson through to score his third goal in as many games. Ange Postecoglou made six changes to his line-up from the team that beat Brentford on Saturday, with Radu Dragusin, Archie Gray, Ben Davies, Lucas Bergvall, Pape Matar Sarr and Yves Bissouma all coming in to start against the Azerbaijani side.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hails Tottenham endeavour after win over Qarabag
arts.sum: Brennan Johnson and Dominic Solanke scored again to help Spurs begin the league phase of the Europa League in style.

arts.ttl: Former player sparks speculations after naming Tottenham attacker as a ‘dream’ transfer for surprise club
arts.sum: Former Brazilian footballer Edmundo has sparked speculation around Tottenham Hotspur forward Richarlison, suggesting that the striker could be a future target for Vasco da Gama. Speaking on his YouTube channel, Edmundo referred to Richarlison as a “dream” signing for the Brazilian club, hinting that a potential transfer could be a possibility in the coming years. arts.ttl: Tottenham overcome nightmare start to earn impressive Europa League win
arts.sum: Tottenham 3-0 Qarabag: Spurs responded well to Radu Dragusin’s early red card but Son Heung-min limped off later on

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou shares what Son Heung-min said after Tottenham captain limped off the pitch tonight
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur got their Europa League campaign off to a great start with a 3-0 victory over Qarabag FK. Admittedly, it wasn’t the easiest of...

arts.ttl: Ten-player Spurs punish wasteful Qarabag in Europa League
arts.sum: Brennan Johnson and Dominic Solanke both scored again for 10-player Tottenham in an entertaining 3-0 victory over Qarabag in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Spurs overcome red card, delay to win UEL opener
arts.sum: Tottenham got their Europa League campaign off to the perfect start on Thursday as they overcame Qarabag 3-0, despite being forced to play the majority of the match with 10 men after defender Radu Dragusin was shown an early red card.
